mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (product_id, user_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{productId}, #{userId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id, r.product_id, r.user_id, r.rating, r.content, r.sentiment, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT r.review_id, r.product_id, r.content, r.created_at FROM reviews r WHERE r.review_id > #{lastId} AND r.content IS NOT NULL AND r.content != '' ORDER BY r.review_id LIMIT #{limit}
